description_long: This object is a classic hot dog featuring a plump, greenish sausage nestled inside a soft, golden-brown bun. The sausage is topped with a generous zigzag of yellow mustard, adding a vibrant contrast to the green and tan tones. The bun appears fluffy and slightly matte, with rounded ends that cradle the sausage securely. The sausage itself has a ribbed texture, suggesting a grilled or patterned surface, and is fully encased by the bun except for the ends. No visible packaging surrounds the hot dog, and there are no additional condiments or toppings besides the mustard. The overall appearance is appetizing and typical of a street food item found in urban parks or at food stands.
description: A hot dog with a greenish sausage in a golden-brown bun, topped with a zigzag of yellow mustard. The bun is soft and the sausage has a ribbed texture.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the hot dog, with the bun and sausage ends visible and mustard peeking along the top.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the zigzag mustard pattern and the ribbed green sausage, with the bun split open to reveal the filling.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the bun and sausage ends, with the mustard line visible along the top.
description_view_3: Top-down view from the opposite end, again emphasizing the mustard zigzag and the ribbed sausage texture.
